projectDescription: Asynchronous ML/AI workers for the Innova EdTech platform, implementing Bayesian Knowledge Tracing, Item Response Theory calibration, LLM-based error classification, OCR vision pipelines, and document AI — deployed as AWS Lambda container images.
keyFeatures: Nightly BKT parameter calibration via brute-force grid search (scipy/numpy, no PyTorch)
Nightly IRT 2PL item calibration with L-BFGS-B MLE (scipy.optimize)
Batched LLM error classification against a 2,600+ entry procedural error taxonomy (Claude Haiku/Sonnet)
OCR vision pipeline: Gemini 2.5 Flash primary with Claude vision escalation for low-confidence results
Guide PDF ingestion: Gemini precheck → Claude Sonnet extraction → pypdfium2 figure rendering
Student submission grading: multi-photo transcription and scoring via Claude Haiku vision
Step-by-step solution key generation per extracted guide question (Claude)
Hourly at-risk student detection (6 alert types: AT_RISK_STUDENT, STUDENT_DROP, UNIT_OFF_TRACK, COMMON_ERROR_IN_TOPIC, GUIDE_GRADING_COMPLETE, GUIDE_COMMON_ERROR)
SSM kill-switch parameters for cost control without redeployment
Structured JSON logging with trace IDs and per-call token/cost accounting (structlog)
publicApiSurface: src.bkt.update.bkt_update(p_known, p_transit, p_slip, p_guess, is_correct) -> float
